pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in verifier.py (DASHBOARD_NAME) and setup_task.sh (SQL deletion), matching task instructions.
Task description directly establishes the role ('You are a Technical Account Manager...').
Task description and data scope involves AWS EC2, RDS, and traffic metrics, directly corresponding to IT Services.
Export script generates the result at this path, and verifier.py expects it at RESULT_PATH.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for graphite_env executive_presentation_styling task by verifying that the environment uses real server metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset downloaded from GitHub. Confirmed the expected dashboard name 'Customer Monthly Report', result file path '/tmp/executive_presentation_styling_result.json', and prompt-injected IT persona directly match the task description instructions, export scripts, and verifier.py logic.
